description: Synthetic SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 native ASTM E1394 QC upload: same H/P/O/R/R/L result shape as a patient upload, but O.12 carries Q and the Sample ID carries the synthetic QC- convention so host-side classification routes it out of the patient result stream (LIS-33). NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-33 / S3.2); MAGLUMI X3 native Online ASTM path after the no-SnibeLis topology amendment
source.note: Application payload only. QC classification is host-side because the X3 ASTM R rows are result-shaped; this fixture asserts the two supported host discriminators: O.12=Q when emitted and a versioned Sample-ID convention (QC- here, synthetic until LIS-75 pins the live site pattern). The Q record carries illustrative lot/level metadata for the bridge/FHIR contract; edge/sim currently asserts stream classification, not QC lot persistence.

terminology.note: Same minimal synthetic MAGLUMI X3 immunoassay seed as the result-upload fixture — QC rows are still normalized to LOINC/UCUM with raw provenance before being routed out of the patient stream.
